title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains Pi, an agent framework with a unique harness layer that enables flexible deployment patterns. The video compares Pi against other frontier agent tools like Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex in terms of architectural complexity and use cases.
